content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.32%, Bank Nifty -1.58%, India VIX +10.75% to 18.65 — risk-off tape with breadth weak. However IT, Pharma and FMCG defensives are bid (COFORGE +7%, TATACONSUM +6.5%, LAURUSLABS +4.2%), which aligns well with current book composition. Strong Q4 prints from held names (MARICO, COFORGE, WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, BAJAJ-AUTO, ABCAPITAL, TATACONSUM, PIDILITIND, SRF) provide fundamental support; manage existing book aggressively, selective new adds in defensive themes.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF defensive position, -1.1% in mild consolidation after gold rally. SL 121 sits 2.2% below CMP — appropriate buffer. Hold as portfolio hedge amid VIX spike."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +14%, revenue +22%, stock at 52-week high on FMCG defensive bid (+2.2% gain, today +0.96%). Current SL 825 vs CMP 838 is 1.6% gap — tighten to 828 (1.2% below CMP, above entry 820 = locked profit). Raise target to 870 (R:R from new SL 828 ≈ 4.0). Per trailing rule (a): SL above entry now that P&L > 2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Big winner +9.4%, today +7.1% on Q4 PAT +144% (boosted by one-time tax reversal). Stock at 1377; current SL 1357.20 is only 1.5% below CMP — keep it at that 1.4-1.5% trail level by setting 1340 (2.7% below CMP, still locks in ~6.4% gain over entry 1259). Raise target to 1450 to give more room post-Cigniti merger. Per trail rule (b): unrealized +9.4%, trail to max(entry, last-2%) = 1350, set 1340 to allow noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -3.2%, SL 1465 sits 1.2% above CMP 1446.90 — SL is ABOVE current price so it functionally provides minimal downside room; if it triggers intraday it triggers. Q4 was solid (PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +280 bps), thesis intact. Per Rule 17, do NOT front-run SL — let it work. Hold; if thesis still valid at SL, that's the maximum loss the trade was sized to accept."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround (PAT Rs 164cr vs loss YoY), pharma at 52-wk highs. Currently +0.9% gain. Modest SL tighten 1600 → 1605 (still 1.7% below CMP 1626.50, well above 1% trail floor). Target retained at 1740. R:R from new SL: (1740-1618)/(1618-1605) = 122/13 — already deep ITM on R:R; preserving structure."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Only +0.5%, SL 2760 sits 1.4% below CMP — adequate buffer. Q4 PAT +47% FY26, refrigerants capex upsize bullish. Too early to trail SL meaningfully; let setup develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% only. Q4 record revenue Rs 8,860 cr but adj PAT growth only +6.3% and UltraTech entry into wires is structural overhang. SL 9020 sits 0.4% below CMP — uncomfortably tight per trail-gap rule but it's the original SL, not a trailed level. Hold; if SL fires it fires — within max-loss budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -4.66% today on a -1.58% Bank Nifty day — sharp underperformance vs sector and broader weakness in PSU Bank (-1.9%) and Financials. CMP 351.80 has BREACHED SL 354 intraday already (low 351.35). Per Rule 17, the SL was placed at 354 as max loss; once breached, EXIT is the right action — not panicked, the SL already triggered. New post-entry information: rate-sensitive financials cluster broke down today, materially weaker than at entry. Realize -3.4%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.9%, SL 10440 = 1.1% below CMP 10550. Buyback at Rs 12000 (17% premium) provides strong floor support. Q4 PAT +103%, record volumes. Auto sector -2.05% today but stock holding -0.38% — relative strength. Don't trail SL yet; thesis very strong, let position breathe."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 468.00,
      "new_target": 510.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.4%, but Q4 PAT +15%, FY27 guidance raised. SL 472 currently sits 0.7% below CMP — too tight per trail-gap rule, very likely noise-stopped. Loosen to 468 (1.5% below CMP) — wait, MODIFY can only tighten SL. Current SL is 472; 468 is LOWER which is loosening for a long. RETRACT — cannot loosen. Keep at 472. Changing action: HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1232.00,
      "new_target": 1310.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.6%, today +4.18%, pharma at 52-wk high. Current SL 1228 is just 2.3% below CMP 1256.90. Tighten to 1232 (above entry 1226 = locked breakeven+) — 2.0% below CMP, satisfies 1% trail-gap. Raise target to 1310 to capture momentum. Per trail rule (a): P&L > 2%, move SL above entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.8%, but stock hit 52-wk high today on Q4 beat (PAT +21%, rev +18%). Pulled back from intraday high 1253 to 1226. SL 1198 sits 2.3% below CMP — adequate buffer. Q4 thesis intact; allow time for the move to develop. Per Rule 17, don't panic-exit on intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 55,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 865.00,
      "stop_loss": 838.00,
      "target": 920.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +32%, Power segment revenue +50% with 23.8% margins, order backlog Rs 17,107 cr (+61% YoY). 3.2x volume surge today with stock bucking capital goods selloff (ABB -10.89%, SIEMENS -6.76%) — strong relative strength signal. Entry at 865, SL 838 = -3.1%, target 920 = +6.4%, R:R = 1:2.0. Position size 55x865 = Rs 47,575 (~4.7% capital). Risk budget: 4.7% × 3.1% = 0.15% portfolio — well within 0.5% cap. Capital Goods cluster: no existing holding in this sector, adds diversification."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge intact, SL has 2.2% buffer."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 828.00, "reasoning": "Trail SL above entry to lock profit on +2.2% winner near 52-wk high."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1340.00, "reasoning": "Major winner +9.4%, trail SL while preserving room for continuation."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact post Q4 beat; respect existing SL."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1605.00, "reasoning": "Modest SL tighten preserving 1.7% buffer."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Early in trade, SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Original SL stands; UltraTech overhang noted but Q4 still bullish."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 354 breached intraday; financials cluster broke down. Cut loss."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor + Q4 PAT +103% supports through current weakness."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Cannot loosen SL; respect existing 472 level. Q4 results today supportive."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1232.00, "reasoning": "Trail above entry to lock breakeven on +2.6% winner."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Pullback from 52-wk high intraday, thesis intact; SL has 2.3% buffer."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates not admitted with reasons: SRF (already held); BAJAJ-AUTO (already held, buyback floor); LAURUSLABS (already held); TATACONSUM (already held); WOCKPHARMA (already held); COFORGE (already held); MARICO (already held); PIDILITIND (already held); DABUR (already held); HCLTECH (BEARISH per research, FY27 guide 1-4% weak, skip); INFY (BEARISH per research, FY27 guide 1.5-3.5%, skip); SUNPHARMA/TORNTPHARM (would add to pharma cluster which already has WOCKPHARMA+LAURUSLABS, cluster cap); MCX, BIOCON, APOLLOHOSP, NTPC, PERSISTENT, BERGEPAINT, NIFTYBEES, SUNPHARMA — pass for now, monitoring. HFCL pending OPEN order from earlier — needs review next tick if still unfilled. CGPOWER added as Capital Goods diversifier with clean relative strength signal.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned for defensive rotation (FMCG, Pharma, Specialty Chem) which is exactly what is being bid today. Strong winners: COFORGE +9.4%, LAURUSLABS +2.6%, MARICO +2.2% — trailed SLs locking profits while preserving upside. ABCAPITAL exit cuts the only meaningful weak position. Adding CGPOWER (4.7%) brings deployment to ~55%. Remaining ~45% cash is appropriate given VIX +10.75% and Nifty -1.32% — opportunistic dry powder for further defensive adds if pharma/FMCG continues to lead. HFCL OPEN order from prior day should be cancelled if not relevant; flagging for next cycle. Daily P&L +0.47% on a -1.32% Nifty day — relative outperformance from defensive positioning."
}
